title: Apply missing patches to v1.6.4-rhel branch
body: A patch was missed when we initially created the branch. Also, apply the fix for CVE-2020-14370.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v1.6.4-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@baude @jnovy PTAL

This may not pass CI initially. If it does not, I will grab the patches we threw on the other v1.6 branch that fixed it there.
@mheon let's wait with CVE-2020-14370 as it was not approved for 2.0-8.3.0 yet (it's Moderate).
@mheon could you please put reference to https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1875289 in the signal 23 proxy commit?
Done. I added a commit to fix the CI config for the branch.
@cevich Poke - mind taking a look at this Cirrus error?

LGTM
What is the META failure?
Dunno, need @cevich to look at it
@cevich CI still failing over here - Cirrus is complaining about being unable to decrypt a value?
